name: The Forge-Eternal
descriptionSeed: Scaffolds forever, half-built cathedrals, and a people who cannot stop making. Nothing here is finished and that is the point — the Wrights believe a completed thing has stopped being alive. The city is glorious, wasteful, and expanding in nine directions, and none of it is done, and they are so happy.
encounterFlavor: Wrights who improve your possessions without asking; a cathedral in its two-hundredth year and its fourth design; someone who finished something and is being quietly pitied.
questSeeds: A Wright has finished a thing — completed it, deliberately — and the city does not know how to respond
The city has grown into something that was standing there, and did not stop
